mnemonics: Academic Press: PUBLISH Human-Centred Research (Purpose, User, Benefit, Law, Impact, Safety, Humanity)
keyPoints: Human-Centred AI research focuses on real-world impact and benefit to society.
It requires interdisciplinary collaboration between computer science, social sciences, and humanities.
Ethical considerations, fairness, and transparency are fundamental to the research process.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on algorithmic performance without considering human factors.
Treating ethics as an afterthought rather than a core research component.
Conflating user-centered design with the broader societal focus of human-centred AI.
